products.name: Natural Creamy Peanut Butter
products.description: 100% natural peanut butter made with roasted peanuts. High protein, no sugar, no preservatives.
products.detailedDescription: Our Natural Creamy Peanut Butter is made from 100% roasted peanuts—pure, simple, and packed with nutrition. With zero added sugar, no preservatives, and no hydrogenated oils, it’s a guilt-free spread that delivers authentic nutty flavor in every bite. Rich in protein, fiber, and healthy fats, this peanut butter is perfect for fitness enthusiasts, weight-watchers, and anyone who loves clean eating. Choose Creamy for a smooth, melt-in-mouth texture. Spread it on toast, blend into shakes, or enjoy it by the spoon—this jar is pure goodness.
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 199kcal, Fat 14g, Carbs 5g, Protein 9g

products.name: Classic Creamy Peanut Butter
products.description: Rich, creamy classic peanut butter. Perfect for sandwiches, smoothies & healthy snacking. Protein-packed goodness.
products.detailedDescription: Taste tradition with our Classic Peanut Butter, a timeless spread crafted from premium roasted peanuts. Rich in protein and bursting with nutty flavor, this peanut butter is a pantry must-have. Available in creamy for smooth perfection and crunchy for that extra bite, it’s ideal for sandwiches, smoothies, or just a spoonful straight from the jar. Packed with nutrition and taste, our Classic Peanut Butter gives you the best of both worlds—wholesome energy and delicious indulgence.
products.ingredients: Roasted Peanut, Sugar, Salt, Stabilizer (to  prevent oil sepration).
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 190kcal, Fat 13g, Carbs 9g, Protein 8g

products.name: Chocolate Creamy Peanut Butter
products.description: Delicious chocolate peanut butter with creamy option. A healthy, protein-rich spread for fitness & chocolate lovers.
products.detailedDescription: Satisfy your cravings with our Chocolate Peanut Butter, a perfect fusion of rich cocoa and roasted peanuts. This guilt-free indulgence delivers the nutty goodness of peanut butter with the chocolaty sweetness you love. Available in Creamy for a silky-smooth treat, it’s perfect for spreading on bread, blending in smoothies, or enjoying as a dessert topping. Packed with protein, fiber, and healthy fats, it’s the ultimate snack for both fitness lovers and chocolate fans.
products.ingredients: Premium Roasted Peanut, Dark Chocolate, Sugar, Salt, Stabilizer (to  prevent oil sepration)
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 190kcal, Fat 13g, Carbs 12g, Protein 6g

products.name: Elaichi (Cardamom) Creamy Peanut Butter
products.description: Unique elaichi cardamom peanut butter in creamy textures. Exotic flavor, rich protein & perfect for Indian taste buds.
products.detailedDescription: Experience a royal twist with our Elaichi Creamy Peanut Butter, infused with the warm, aromatic flavor of cardamom. A unique blend of premium roasted peanuts and Indian spices, this spread is both nutritious and flavorful. Choose Creamy for smooth indulgence. High in protein, fiber, and healthy fats, this exotic spread is perfect with parathas, toast, desserts, or even festive sweets. A jar of traditional taste with modern health benefits.
products.ingredients: Premium Roasted Peanut, Sugar, Elaichi (Cardamom), Salt, Stabilizer (to  prevent oil sepration)
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 202kcal, Fat 15g, Carbs 7g, Protein 9g

products.detailedDescription: Discover the pure goodness of our Zero Sugar Peanut Butter, made with 98% premium roasted peanuts and a small amount of stabilizer for smooth consistency. With absolutely no added sugar, no artificial preservatives, and no hydrogenated oils, this peanut butter is the perfect choice for health-conscious individuals and fitness lovers

products.name: Almond Butter
products.description: Made from 100% roasted California almonds, our almond butter is rich in protein, fiber & healthy fats—pure, creamy & nutritious
products.detailedDescription: Experience the pure taste of nature with our Almond Butter, crafted from 100% premium California almonds—slow roasted to perfection. With no added sugar, no preservatives, and no hydrogenated oils, it delivers wholesome nutrition in every spoon. Packed with plant-based protein, dietary fiber, Vitamin E, and healthy fats, almond butter is the ideal superfood spread for fitness enthusiasts, weight watchers, and anyone seeking a nutritious lifestyle. Spread it on toast, blend into smoothies, or enjoy straight from the jar—it’s creamy, nutty, and irresistibly healthy.
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 195kcal, Fat 18g, Carbs 6g, Protein 7g

products.name: Cashew Butter
products.description: Smooth, creamy cashew butter made from 100% roasted premium cashews. Naturally rich in protein, magnesium & healthy fats.
products.detailedDescription: Delight your taste buds with the rich, creamy flavor of our Cashew Butter, made from 100% premium roasted cashews. With no added sugar, no preservatives, and no artificial ingredients, it’s a pure nut butter that’s both indulgent and healthy. Naturally packed with protein, magnesium, iron, and healthy fats, cashew butter is a delicious source of energy that supports overall wellness. Enjoy it as a spread, in desserts, smoothies, or straight from the jar—its silky smooth texture makes every spoonful irresistible.
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 186kcal, Fat 15g, Carbs 9g, Protein 6g

products.name: Tahini (Sesame Paste)
products.description: Smooth, creamy tahini made from 100% roasted sesame seeds. Rich in protein, calcium & healthy fats—perfect for dips, dressings & spreads
products.detailedDescription: Our Tahini is crafted from 100% premium roasted sesame seeds, stone-ground into a smooth, creamy paste. With no added sugar, preservatives, or artificial ingredients, it’s a wholesome superfood packed with plant-based protein, calcium, iron, and healthy fats. Traditionally used in Middle Eastern and Mediterranean cuisine, tahini is the key ingredient in hummus, baba ganoush, dressings, sauces, and desserts. Its nutty, earthy flavor and silky texture make it a versatile kitchen essential for both home cooks and professional chefs. Whether you’re looking for a nutritious spread, a vegan-friendly ingredient, or a natural source of energy, our 100% sesame seed tahini is the perfect choice.
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 191kcal, Fat 17g, Carbs 7g, Protein 5g

products.name: Roasted Peanut Dices
products.description: Premium roasted peanut dices with uniform size & rich crunch. Ideal for bakery, confectionery, snacks & toppings
products.detailedDescription: Our Roasted Peanut Dices are carefully processed from the finest quality peanuts, roasted to perfection, and diced into uniform pieces. These crunchy, flavorful dices are perfect for bakeries, confectionery, ice creams, chocolates, snack/protein bars, and savory food products. Packed with protein, fiber, and essential nutrients, roasted peanut dices not only enhance flavor but also add texture and nutritional value to any recipe. Consistently roasted and precisely cut, they are widely trusted by food processors and manufacturers for high-quality production

products.name: Hazealnut Chocolate Spread
products.description: Rich, creamy hazelnut chocolate spread made with premium roasted hazelnuts & cocoa. Perfect for toast, desserts & indulgent snacking
products.detailedDescription: Indulge in the irresistible taste of our Hazelnut Chocolate Spread, crafted with premium roasted hazelnuts and fine cocoa for a silky-smooth texture and luxurious flavor. With the perfect balance of nutty richness and chocolaty sweetness, it’s a delicious treat for both kids and adults. Ideal for spreading on toast, pancakes, waffles, or baking into cakes, cookies, and desserts, this spread is a pantry must-have for indulgent snacking. Rich in protein, healthy fats, and natural energy, it not only satisfies your sweet cravings but also adds nutritional value to your diet. Enjoy it straight from the jar or get creative in the kitchen—our Hazelnut Chocolate Spread is pure happiness in every spoon.
products.ingredients: Hazelnut (10%), Cocoa Powder (10%), Milk Solid (3%), Palm Oil (35%), Sugar (41.2%), Salt, Emulsifier (INS471),Vanilla, Natural identical Flavor
products.nutrition: Per 2 tbsp (32g): Calories 190, Fat 16g, Carbs 7g, Protein 8g
